Download Your Free
Buyer Consult Guide

Everything you need to know to successfully purchase a home in the Central Valley - from start to sold. Enter your name and email and we'll send it straight to your inbox.

🔒 No spam. Your info is never shared. We'll follow up personally - not with a robot.

The Buying Process

From First Call to Keys in Hand

We've simplified the home buying process into 7 clear steps so you always know exactly where you are and what comes next. No surprises - ever.

📞
Step 01
Buyer Consultation

We sit down, understand your goals, timeline, and budget - and make a plan.

🏦
Step 02
Get Pre-Approved

We connect you with trusted lenders so you know exactly what you can afford.

🏡
Step 03
House Hunting

We find homes that fit your criteria and show you every option - including off-market.

📝
Step 04
Submit Offer

We craft a competitive offer strategy designed to win - without overpaying.

✅
Step 05
Offer Accepted

Taylor reviews every document and negotiates the best possible terms for you.

🔍
Step 06
Contingency Period

Inspections, appraisals, and contingency removals - Theresa manages every detail.

🔑
Step 07
Close & Celebrate

Sign, fund, and pick up your keys. Then celebrate - you're a homeowner!

Why Buy With Us

We Find Homes.
We Win Offers.

🏘️
Local Presence

We work across Stanislaus, San Joaquin, and Merced Counties every day. We know the communities, the market conditions, and the kinds of properties available in each area - so we can help you find the right fit.

💪
Smart Offer Strategy

In a competitive market, how your offer is written matters as much as the number. Taylor's reputation, relationships, and negotiation approach mean your offer is taken seriously - and wins.

💬
We Never Leave You Guessing

From your first call to closing day, we communicate every step. You'll always know exactly what's happening, what's coming next, and what we're doing on your behalf.

🤝
Zero Pressure, Ever

We're not here to rush you into a purchase. We're here to help you find the right home. Take your time - we'll be right here when you're ready, whether that's next week or two years from now.

Who We Work With

Every Buyer Is Welcome Here

Whether you're buying your very first home or your fifth investment property, we have the expertise and the patience to guide you through it.

🏠
First-Time Buyers

We specialize in first-time buyer education. We'll walk you through every step, explain every document, and make sure you feel confident and excited - not overwhelmed. Our Buyer Consult Guide was built specifically for you.

🔄
Move-Up Buyers

Growing family, new chapter, or simply ready for more space? We coordinate the sale of your current home and the purchase of your next one seamlessly - making sure you never feel caught in the middle.

📈
Investors

Dave and Taylor bring real investment experience - BRRRR, buy-and-hold, flips. We understand the numbers, the markets, and how to find deals that actually make sense. We invest ourselves, so we get it.
